name: Loving Kiss
descrip: Start making out with an opponent.
outcome: [AttackerName] leans forward, sensually wrapping [AttackerHisOrHer] arms around the back of [TargetName]'s neck, and pulls [TargetHimOrHer] into an deep intimate makeout session, sending a shiver of pleasure through [TargetName] as [AttackerName] seductively gazes into [TargetHisOrHer] eyes and [AttackerHisOrHer] tongue lovingly invades [TargetHisOrHer] mouth.
miss: [AttackerName] leans forward, and tries to sensually wrap [AttackerHisOrHer] arms around the back of [TargetName]'s neck, but [TargetName] keeps enough distance between them!
